'''bayofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wych|wych]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wych|wych]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bayofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæyefeth|bæyefeth]] || [[word:bæyefej|bæyefej]] || [[word:bæyefesh|bæyefesh]] || [[word:bæyefe|bæyefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayoyofoth|bayoyofoth]] || [[word:bayoyofoj|bayoyofoj]] || [[word:bayoyofosh|bayoyofosh]] || [[word:bayoyofo|bayoyofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayofoth|bayofoth]] || [[word:bayofoj|bayofoj]] || [[word:bayofosh|bayofosh]] || [[word:bayofo|bayofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayoffoth|bayoffoth]] || [[word:bayoffoj|bayoffoj]] || [[word:bayoffosh|bayoffosh]] || [[word:bayoffof|bayoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bayofotho|bayofotho]] || [[word:bayofojo|bayofojo]] || [[word:bayofosho|bayofosho]] || [[word:bayofoko|bayofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bayofoth|bayofoth]] || [[word:bayofoj|bayofoj]] || [[word:bayofosh|bayofosh]] || [[word:bayofo|bayofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bayofothol|bayofothol]] || [[word:bayofojol|bayofojol]] || [[word:bayofoshol|bayofoshol]] || [[word:bayofokol|bayofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bayofothotho|bayofothotho]] || [[word:bayofojojo|bayofojojo]] || [[word:bayofoshosho|bayofoshosho]] || [[word:bayofoko|bayofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bayofothon|bayofothon]] || [[word:bayofojon|bayofojon]] || [[word:bayofoshon|bayofoshon]] || [[word:bayofokon|bayofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bayofothoro|bayofothoro]] || [[word:bayofojoro|bayofojoro]] || [[word:bayofoshoro|bayofoshoro]] || [[word:bayofokoro|bayofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
